input.background: Table 13.3 lists birth weights of infants based on the smoking status of mothers.
input.question: Outline this study's design using a sketch of the type presented in $\$ 2.2$ (see Figure 2.1) to depict this study's design.

output.answer: This study is nonexperimental ("observational") because the investigator did not assign the explanatory factor (smoking) to study participants.

group_1_birth_weights.description: Birth weights of infants whose mothers are nonsmokers.

group_2_birth_weights.description: Birth weights of infants whose mothers are ex-smokers.

group_3_birth_weights.description: Birth weights of infants whose mothers smoke less than half a pack of cigarettes per day.

group_4_birth_weights.description: Birth weights of infants whose mothers smoke half a pack or more of cigarettes per day.

smoking_status.description: Smoking status of the mothers categorized into four groups.
